info.name: Guest Bridge
info.summary: Creates guest users in Keycloak when sharing with external emails
info.description:
When a Nextcloud user shares a file or folder with an external email address, this app automatically provisions a guest user account via the account portal API. The guest receives an email with a passkey setup link. After completing setup, they can log in via OIDC and access the shared resources.
Handles both regular file/folder shares and Collabora (richdocuments) shares. Public link sharing remains unaffected.
info.author: Mothertree
